mapper.select:
SELECT P.ID, P.PLAN_NO, P.PLAN_YEAR, P.PLAN_NM, P.TOT_PLAN_AMT, P.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, P.REG_ID FROM PP_PLAN P LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PP_STS' AND S.CD=P.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE P.DEL_YN='N'
AND (P.PLAN_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR P.PLAN_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND P.STS=#{sts} AND P.PLAN_YEAR=#{planYear} ORDER BY P.ID DESC

SELECT P.ID, P.COMP_CD, P.PLAN_NO, P.PLAN_YEAR, P.PLAN_NM, P.PURC_GRP_CD, P.TOT_PLAN_AMT, P.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, P.REMARK, P.REG_ID FROM PP_PLAN P LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PP_STS' AND S.CD=P.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE P.ID=#{id} AND P.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT PI.ID, PI.PLAN_ID, PI.LINE_NO, PI.ITEM_CD, PI.ITEM_NM, PI.UNIT_CD, PI.PLAN_QTY, PI.PLAN_AMT, PI.REMARK, NVL((SELECT SUM(GI.AMT) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI JOIN GR_RECEIPT GR ON GR.ID=GI.RECEIPT_ID AND GR.DEL_YN='N' AND GR.STS='CFM' AND TO_CHAR(GR.GR_YMD,'YYYY')=#{year} WHERE GI.ITEM_CD=PI.ITEM_CD),0) AS ACTUAL_AMT FROM PP_PLAN_ITEM PI WHERE PI.PLAN_ID=#{planId} ORDER BY PI.LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PP_PLAN (COMP_CD, PLAN_NO, PLAN_YEAR, PLAN_NM, PURC_GRP_CD, TOT_PLAN_AMT, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{planNo}, #{planYear}, #{planNm}, #{purcGrpCd}, NVL(#{totPlanAmt},0), NVL(#{sts},'DRAFT'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PP_PLAN SET PLAN_YEAR=#{planYear}, PLAN_NM=#{planNm}, PURC_GRP_CD=#{purcGrpCd}, TOT_PLAN_AMT=NVL(#{totPlanAmt},0), REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE PP_PLAN SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE PP_PLAN SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PP_PLAN_ITEM (PLAN_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, PLAN_QTY, PLAN_AMT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{planId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{planQty},0), NVL(#{planAmt},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
